name: Armenian Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dried Apricots (soaked in 1/2 cup water for 1 hour)
1/2 cup Dried Garbanzo Beans (soaked overnight in water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, bring the soaked apricots and their soaking water to a boil. Add the soaked, drained garbanzo beans and 1 cup of water. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 minutes.
2. Add the lentils, onions, and 4 cups of water to the pot. Bring to a boil. Lower the heat, cover, and cook until the garbanzos are tender (about 2 hours). Add 2 tablespoons of malt syrup and mix well. Serve over brown rice.
